info.name: Rawdati API v2.0 — Complete
info.description:
Complete Rawdati Multi-Tenant Kindergarten API

Setup:
1. Set BASE_URL = http://localhost:8000
2. Set TENANT_SLUG = demo
3. Run Login requests — tokens auto-saved to env vars
